sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80729" key="penta/skalmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντά-σκαλμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80729.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with five sets of tholes</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σκαλμοί</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:5:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
